channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: These 20 clever kitchen storage ideas from IKEA will give you heaps of extra space to cook, with no DIY necessary
item.description: I'm TechRadar's homes editor, and I've hand-picked 20 smart solutions that will double the storage space in your kitchen with no DIY necessary.

item.title: Ask.com has shut down, marking the official farewell to the Internet's favorite butler
item.description: RIP to the original AI search bot.

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: How do you issue a ticket to a robotaxi?
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

item.title: Xiaomi POCO F8 Ultra vs Google Pixel 10 : comment choisir le meilleur téléphone premium ?
item.description: Avec le POCO F8 Ultra, Xiaomi tente d'attirer les projecteurs à lui avec un smartphone au positionnement haut de gamme. Suffisamment intéressant pour vous détourner d'un Google Pixel 10 ? Et pourquoi pas… tentons d'y voir plus clair avec ce nouveau comparatif.

item.title: Lego is releasing a Sega Genesis set complete with little controllers
item.description: It's not playable, but it's still pretty cool.

item.title: La Terre devient repérable de très loin dans l’espace : ces traces humaines qui pourraient nous trahir
item.description: Certaines des plus imposantes constructions humaines seraient visibles depuis l'espace, au point que, si nous étions observés par des civilisations extraterrestres, elles ne pourraient pas nous rater.

item.title: SNL Weekend Update covers Spirit Airlines shutdown and more
item.description: SNL Weekend Update shares jokes covering Spirit Airlines and the attempted shooting at President Trump

item.title: Reggie Fils-Aimé says Amazon once asked Nintendo to break the law
item.description: Way back in the DS days, Nintendo decided to stop selling to Amazon. During a recent lecture at NYU, former Nintendo of America President Reggie Fils-Aimé said it was because Amazon was seeking preferential treatment that would have hurt its relationship with other retailers, and potentially broken the law. The two sides have since made […]

item.title: Ce purificateur d’air Dyson s’allège de 250 € pendant les French Days et les personnes allergiques ne pourront plus s’en passer
item.description: Le printemps est arrivé et les allergies ont repris leur place. Afin d'en limiter les dégâts, l'achat d'un purificateur d'air peut être intéressant. Direction Dyson qui retire près de 250 euros sur son Big+Quiet Formaldehyde BP03 et le fait tomber à 749 euros.

item.title: Shokz’s bassy OpenRun Pro 2 are $40 off thanks to a new Mother’s Day promo
item.description: If you’re looking to pick up a pair of open-ear headphones for yourself — or your mom — Shokz is running a Mother’s Day sale. Now through May 10th, the company’s best pair of bone conduction headphones, the OpenRun Pro 2, are available from Amazon, Best Buy, and Shokz for around $139.95 ($40 off), their […]

item.title: I've been gaming on my phone with the GameSir G8 Galileo, and it's the closest I've come to replacing my console
item.description: The GameSir G8 Galileo is a wired USB-C mobile controller with full-size grips, Hall effect joysticks and triggers, and a pair of programmable back buttons.

item.title: Windows 11 is such a memory hog that I've had to resort to RAM optimizers — but can Microsoft turn things around with project K2?
item.description: Windows 11 and other applications are using way too much RAM, so I found a temporary solution while Microsoft's project K2 begins.
